description: refs to historic drafts are processed as historic drafts

tests.description: first item not a string is valid
tests.comment: if the implementation is not processing the $ref as a 2019-09 schema, this test will fail

description: $schema after $defs still sets the dialect for $defs
comment: keyword order is insignificant, so the dialect from $schema applies to subschemas in $defs even though $defs appears before $schema; prefixItems is not a keyword in 2019-09 and is therefore ignored

tests.comment: if $defs is built with the default dialect rather than the one from $schema, prefixItems forces the first item to be a string and this fails
